surgicalNow.title: Wire the real KV policy dispatcher into `kolm serve`

Expand --kv-cache to {auto,off,streaming,h2o,snapkv,pyramidkv,kivi2,kivi4,shard} + add --kv-budget/--kv-sink/--kv-window/--kv-group/--kv-residual. Keep KOLM_KV_CACHE_BACKEND=shard back-compat. Makes the already-tested kvpress/KIVI dispatcher reachable end-to-end.

surgicalNow.title: Load trained ClusterRouterStats in the live dispatch path (turn the dead router on)

surgicalNow.what: Replace the hardcoded stats:null (which forces cold_start static routing) with a per-(tenant,namespace) stats load, best-effort try/catch, falling back to null when empty. Un-trained namespaces unchanged; trained namespaces go live. Gate behind existing route_mode opt-in.

surgicalNow.title: Close the routing flywheel: call recordRouteOutcome after dispatch
surgicalNow.where: src/router.js after dispatch+output (~6807) and receipt assembly (~6898), same best-effort style as existing lake writes
surgicalNow.what: On each served cost_quality/semantic request, compute cluster_id via stats.assign and call route-quality-store.recordRouteOutcome with chosen model/provider/realized_quality (reuse K-Score/acceptance signal)/cost/latency. Only missing link to make trainClustersFromLake/getClusterQualityStats produce real stats from live traffic.

Prefer nvfp4 when device runtime is Blackwell+tensorrt/vllm and emit the export-nvfp4 command. Oracle never recommends the research #1 4-bit format today even though export/calib code exists.

surgicalNow.title: Add an enforced post-quant accuracy gate to bakeoff + oracle proof

Turn the oracle's advisory 'run holdout eval' string into a structured gate {required:true,max_rel_drop:0.03,metric:'kscore'}. Closes the research's named #1 risk (silent accuracy degradation).

surgicalNow.title: Thread EAGLE draft-tree params (eagle_topk/num_steps/num_draft_tokens) through to vLLM

Extend wave921 + eagle3 _self_test.

surgicalNow.title: Ship an explicit proof-scope caveat in the signed report

surgicalNow.what: Add a caveat stating the report proves artifact authenticity, timestamp and tamper-evident log inclusion, and does NOT prove a specific inference output was computed by this model unless a cryptographically verified TEE/opML/zkML attestation is present; gate stronger wording on whether any registered verifier returned verified:true. Prevents over-reading as proof-of-inference.

surgicalNow.what: Route NRAS/GPU reports through confidential-compute.verifyAttestation('nras',report) alongside the existing CPU-TEE parser, storing shape_ok + report_hash + verifier:'shape_v1'. Makes the documented GPU-TEE shape check + pluggable crypto interface reachable on the live enrollment path. Keep verified:false honest default.

surgicalNow.title: Default quality stage to the learned classifier + percentile keep

surgicalNow.what: The learned logistic classifier uses input+output relevance (a fluent off-topic answer scores low) where the heuristic is output-only. Make it default with DCLM-style percentile retention; ships cold-start weights, immediately closes part of the DEITA-quality gap. Gated by wave921-data-curate-modules + curate tests.

surgicalNow.title: Add MoE-aware strategies + frontier method names to distill-strategy oracle
surgicalNow.where: src/distill-strategy.js STRATEGIES (add moe_to_dense_distill) + scoreStrategy MoE bonus + commandFor moe-distill
surgicalNow.what: Add moe_to_dense_distill scoring highest when teacher resolves to a known MoE family (cross-ref src/moe-registry.js); cite krafton-ai/moe-to-dense + SlimMoE in references. Pure catalog/scoring change, no execution. Stops the planner under-recommending for MoE inputs.

surgicalNow.title: Capture vLLM spec-decode acceptance metrics into the runtime passport
surgicalNow.where: apps/runtime/serve.py _vllm_prometheus_metrics (874-886) + /info; src/serve-config.js speculativeHeadPassportEntry (877-908)
surgicalNow.what: Parse vllm:spec_decode_num_accepted_tokens_total / num_draft_tokens_total + mean acceptance length from the already-scraped Prometheus text and surface as measured.acceptance_rate/accepted_length so the passport flips estimated->tested. Pure parse+plumb, unit-testable with a canned metrics string.

bets.theme: Real measurement / accuracy-gate harness (boot-and-measure on GPU)
bets.description: A shared 'probe-harness' that boots an artifact under a config and measures real numbers recurs as the missing piece across at least five categories: quantization post-quant accuracy floor (kscore drop vs baseline), KV-cache measure_kv_policy (compression_ratio/retained/evicted/peak_kv_mb/quality_delta to flip passport rows estimated->tested), spec-decode serve-time acceptance-rate/speedup, distillation method bake-off (SeqKD vs ROPD vs GAD with a teacher judge), and agent-security benign-utility/utility-under-attack ASR. Build ONE boot-and-measure load driver in apps/export/probe.py and reuse it; without it, all 'receipt is the proof' claims on these axes stay synthetic/estimated.

Multiple curation/routing capabilities are silently capped because they run on the 256-d hash-bag lexical embedder. A single pluggable real-embedding provider behind embed() (env-selected, default unchanged) simultaneously lifts data-curation dedup/clustering/diversity/DSIR/label-error AND enables the calibrated meets-bar quality predictor for routing and per-model similarity discrimination. High-leverage single change touching many consumers.

bets.theme: Frontier trainers that are entirely absent (the headline #1 methods)
bets.description: Three top-ranked frontier methods have zero code and warrant full specs with cost caps: GAD (Generative Adversarial Distillation, arXiv:2511.10643) the #1 black-box distillation method; MoE-teacher->dense-student collapse (krafton moe-to-dense, DO-ACP expert scoring + FFN merge + staged forward-KL) plus actually executing expert pruning; and EAGLE-3 draft-head auto-training from the same distillation data (SpecForge/vLLM speculators v0.3) so kolm-distilled models are self-accelerating instead of depending on 3 third-party heads. Each reuses existing GRPO/KD/distill cores.

bets.theme: Privacy execution path (the honest stubs that never run)
bets.description: The privacy story is architecturally complete but does not execute end-to-end: air-gap distill writes a queue that no worker consumes, cloud-distill is a no_pool_configured stub, and there is no confidential-GPU (H100/H200 CC) infra generated. Compounds with the hosted-fleet bet. Stand up the trainer-queue consumer (apps/trainer worker scanning ~/.kolm/airgap-distill-runs and a managed/bridged GPU pool over the existing Modal/RunPod/Together runner scaffolds), then add DP-SGD (Opacus + epsilon accountant) and GPU-TEE BYOC scripts with NRAS attestation capture.

Every TEE/GPU attestation path is shape-only/TOFU; no vendor cert chain is walked anywhere. Specs: a real NRAS verifier (validate token sig, walk NVIDIA device-identity chain to pinned root, bind nonce to output digest) registered via the existing pluggable seam; real TDX/SEV-SNP/Nitro cert-chain verification ending pure TOFU; and a Proven-Compute Receipt binding the Ed25519-signed artifact to a GPU-TEE attestation anchored in the transparency log. This is the only path from 'signed artifact + tamper-evident log' to 'proven compute'.

bets.theme: In-browser verify-then-run (WebGPU) demo + signed weights digest
bets.description: The flagship on-device demo (verify the model runs AND is the signed one, entirely in-browser) is unbuilt; the browser layer only checks JSON signatures. Spec: a WebGPU runner (WebLLM/LlamaWeb) that SHA-256s downloaded weight bytes in-browser and checks an Ed25519-signed weights_sha256 from the manifest BEFORE handing bytes to the engine. Requires the prerequisite bet of pinning+signing a weights SHA-256 in the manifest/artifact (the puller already computes the hash).

bets.theme: Hosted managed distill+serve fleet + continuous-RL (competitive parity)
bets.description: The single biggest DX gap vs every named competitor (OpenPipe/Together/Fireworks/Modal/Baseten): no Kolm-hosted training/inference fleet, so 'upload captures -> we distill -> download signed .kolm' cannot execute without the customer bringing a GPU. Pair with a continuous-RL loop (OpenPipe ART parity) re-distilling from production captures gated by the existing W808 regression gate and signed into superseding .kolm artifacts. Reuses existing runner scaffolds, CLOUD_METER_RATES, grpo/online_dpo.

bets.theme: Per-expert mixed-precision quant + size-aware quality curves
bets.description: MoE quant is uniform-bit per group (byte-accounting only, not real per-expert precision); sub-2-bit expert methods (MC-MoE/GEMQ) are oracle-listed external_repo but never run; and FP4 oracle quality_loss is a flat scalar that cannot express small-model sensitivity (the research's named #1 NVFP4 risk). Specs: a real per-expert quant loop assigning bits by activation hotness (router fp16), a paramsB-dependent FP4 quality curve, and fusing the BATQuant calibration plan into the NVFP4 export instead of modelopt's trivial forward_loop.

Recurring drift: three speculative-decoding draft registries disagree; student-arch-recommender slugs are unlinked to real pullable backbones; FRONTIER_MODELS verified tier is a year stale; no registry carries benchmark scores (MMLU-Pro/IFEval/BFCL) so ranking is VRAM/license-only. Consolidate into single sources of truth with cross-file equality tests, refresh verified rows, and add a sourced/dated benchmark table to enable score-aware recommend().

alreadyFrontier: Distillation engine is genuinely at frontier and logit-free: ROPD (arXiv:2605.07396) as a real GPU GRPO loop, DistiLLM-2 contrastive SKL/SRKL (ICML2025 oral), GKD via trl, MiniLLM reverse-KL/JSD, CoT distill, on-policy student-sample generation, and honest no-trainer envelopes. Do not rebuild these — only GAD and the stale recommender are gaps.

BATQuant-style FP4 calibration (arXiv:2603.16590) with real E2M1 grid + block-wise learnable clipping + per-column affine transform, plus NVFP4 export with a correct Blackwell-native gate (compute_cap>=10) and MoE-aware router-fp16/expert-aggressive grouping. The FP4 math exists and is self-tested; the gap is purely wiring it into the oracle and fusing the two halves.

KV-cache breadth is frontier: importance-tiered 7-class profiler, Shard PCA+Hadamard+VQ structural contract, full StreamingLLM/H2O/SnapKV/PyramidKV/KIVI-2/4 policy registry with honest per-runtime gates, real kvpress + HQQQuantizedCache Python dispatch, vLLM FP8 KV. Everything is built and unit-tested — the only gap is the CLI dead-end.

Serving-side speculative decoding correctly uses the MODERN vLLM speculative_config dict (avoids the deprecated flat speculative_model kwarg removed in vLLM>=0.10), EAGLE-3 default with real verified head repos, multi-backend dispatch (vLLM/SGLang/llama.cpp), and a real n-gram LookaheadCache. Null-until-measured discipline avoids fabricated speedups.

Crypto/transparency primitives are frontier and correct: RFC 6962/9162 Merkle inclusion with the lone-right-edge bug fixed + timingSafeEqual, append-only transparency log with C2SP signed-note checkpoints and witness co-signing, RFC 3161 timestamping with full offline re-verification, third-party Ed25519 auditor attestation with enforced distinct-key separation.

Model-signing standards alignment is correct where wired: byte-exact DSSE PAE (the #1 cosign interop trap), in-toto v1 Statement + SLSA Provenance v1 with required fields and honest 'Build L2 shape' conformance, OMS predicateType with embedded RFC 8037 OKP JWK, zero-heavy-deps. Gaps are emission/scope, not correctness.

Per-tool-call Ed25519 signed MCP receipts binding {tool,args_hash,result_hash,tenant,ts,transport} with deterministic offline verify, result-passthrough contract, and 19 tamper tests — matches/exceeds Signet & KYA/Vouched. Combined with Merkle anchoring this is the rare differentiator almost no competitor has.

Agent-security audit-trail tamper-evidence (per-tenant HMAC-SHA256 append-only chain with deterministic canonicalization + verifier) is ahead-of-benchmark — the research confirms no defensible public benchmark covers it. OWASP-LLM/Agentic + MITRE-ATLAS taxonomy mapping and untested/non-inflation scoring discipline are exactly right.

Data-curation algorithms are frontier-grade: real Broder MinHash+LSH with optimal banding + true-Jaccard verify, k-center-greedy/facility-location/BADGE/DSIR selection, Confident-Learning label-error detection, c-TF-IDF cluster labeling. Only the lexical hash-bag embedder caps quality — swap the embedder, keep the algorithms.

Fine-tune variant stack is complete and correct: DoRA + rsLoRA + LoRA+ + PiSSA/OLoRA (with the subtle mandatory two-phase snapshot/convert save) + NEFTune + GaLore with correct incompatible-combo refusals, plus Unsloth+Liger+FlashAttention single-GPU path, single-5090 32B QLoRA, and an FSDP multi-node launcher with memory estimator. Gaps are worker defaults/dispatch, not capability.

Capture->distill->signed-evidence loop differentiators are real and rare: drop-in Anthropic/OpenAI/OpenRouter/Gemini capture proxies with reasoning-trace extraction, teacher-source TOS-risk classification with hard-deny of proprietary teachers, and the cryptographic signed .kolm provenance artifact (5-step HMAC chain + holdout-measured accuracy + full lineage) that the research says no competitor combines.

Privacy detectors and fences are frontier-quality: 19 PII classes + 11 secret shapes with Luhn-checked PANs and a policy engine, tight loopback/unix local-teacher allow-list with egress block under KOLM_AIRGAP, tenant fencing with LOCAL/THIRD_PARTY partition, and fail-closed shape-only attestation honesty. Gaps are applying redaction to training + executing the queued runs, not detection.
dependencies: Routing: 'Load trained ClusterRouterStats' (surgical) is inert without 'Close the flywheel: recordRouteOutcome' (surgical) populating stats AND a 'kolm route train' CLI (surgical) persisting a snapshot the gateway loads. Ship all three together or the dead router stays dead. The calibrated meets-bar predictor (spec) further depends on the real-embedding swap (bet).

KV-cache: 'Fuse ITKV profile into dispatched policy' (surgical) requires 'Wire the dispatcher into kolm serve' (surgical) to land first — the profile has no dispatch path to feed until the CLI calls selectKvCachePolicy. The measure_kv_policy spec depends on the shared boot-and-measure probe harness bet.

Small-LLM students: 'Re-point default tier off Qwen2.5' (surgical) must follow 'Add 2026 frontier students to the registry' (surgical) — DEFAULT_MODEL cannot point at rows that do not yet exist. Same ordering for promoting a current row into FRONTIER_MODELS.

On-device WebGPU demo (bet) depends on first pinning+signing a weights SHA-256 in the model-weights manifest/artifact (bet/spec) — the 'is-the-signed-one' half is only cryptographically real once a signed weights digest exists for the browser to check.

Quantization accuracy gate, KV 'tested' passport rows, spec-decode acceptance metrics, and the distillation method bake-off ALL depend on the single shared boot-and-measure probe harness (bet). Building it once avoids four divergent measurement implementations; the spec deltas explicitly note this overlap.

MoE-to-dense distillation (bet) depends on first executing expert pruning to a smaller checkpoint (spec) — pruning/merge is the prerequisite stage before the FFN-collapse + forward-KL recovery can run. Both reuse the existing distill.py compute_loss.

Privacy execution: DP-SGD, confidential-GPU BYOC scripts, and the air-gap worker (all confidential-compute) compound with the hosted managed fleet (compile-api). The air-gap queue consumer and the hosted fleet both need the same trainer-queue + runner-pool plumbing — design one orchestrator over the existing Modal/RunPod/Together runner scaffolds rather than two.

Model-signing: the build-time DSSE sidecar and the OMS file-manifest bundle (both surgical) both write into src/artifact.js using the per-member SHA-256 map already computed into manifest.hashes — sequence them in one artifact-build change to share that digest computation and avoid double iteration.

No hard contradictions found across the 16 deltas; the recurring tension is breadth-of-honest-stubs vs depth-of-execution — many categories are 'built and tested but unwired,' so prioritize wiring (surgical-now) before net-new frontier trainers (bets), since wiring unlocks already-paid-for capability at low risk.

MCP: the in-toto export for mcp-tool-call-1 (surgical) and the Merkle anchoring of MCP receipts (surgical) both assume the durable store+signer wiring (surgical, value 9) is in place first — without persistence the receipts they reference are process-local and lost on restart.
